  "findings": [
    "Severe honeycomb voids in concrete structure due to inadequate consolidation/missed vibration",
    "Non-compliance with ACI 301 and ACI 304 consolidation requirements",
    "Potential reduction in structural capacity and durability of the in-service asset"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Perform non-destructive testing (NDT) such as ultrasonic pulse velocity or core drilling to determine depth of voids",
    "Consult structural engineer of record to evaluate structural integrity",
    "Chip out loose concrete to sound material and perform structural repair using approved polymer-modified mortar or pressure grouting"
  ],
  "rationale": "The presence of honeycomb in an in-service commercial concrete structure indicates a failure to properly consolidate the concrete during placement, violating ACI 301 and ACI 304. This defect compromises structural integrity, exposes reinforcement to corrosion, and requires immediate engineering evaluation and structural remediation.",

    "ACI 301 Specifications for Structural Concrete",
    "ACI 304R Guide for Measuring, Mixing, Transporting, and Placing Concrete"
  ]
